hero.description: At Advance Group, we don't just distribute products; we act as your strategic partner to position and scale your brand in Puerto Rico and beyond.
hero.strategicPartnersDesc: We bring your product to market with success and high-level execution.

slides.tag: Advance Depot – Warehousing & fulfillment in PR

logistics.name: Advance Logistics
logistics.description: Specialized delivery across the island with a 24-hour delivery guarantee, including Vieques and Culebra.

depot.name: Advance Depot
depot.description: Puerto Rico's warehousing and fulfillment network: three Caguas facilities with refrigerated coverage, pick & pack and real-time inventory management — ready to ship in 24 hours.

solutions.name: Advance Solutions
solutions.description: Commercial strategy, sales, distribution and brand growth across multiple industries.

businessLines.sectionSubtitle: We integrate strategy, warehousing and distribution under a single standard of excellence.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: Advance Group is flexible and adaptable. We work cross-functionally to empower brands in any sector.

services.heading: Our Solutions
services.subtitle: From strategy to final delivery.
services.solution360Quote: At Advance, we power your commercial growth by integrating warehousing and express distribution.
defaultBenefits: Expertise across multiple industries and channels.

contact.description: Advance Group integrates logistics, warehousing, distribution, custom packaging and sales force under one roof. Tell us what you need to move, store, package or sell — and we'll execute it.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your product or need...
contact.termsText: I have read and agree to the
contact.smsConsent: I authorize Advance Group to contact me via SMS regarding my request. Message and data rates may apply. I can unsubscribe by replying STOP at any time.
contact.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms before sending.

footer.description: Puerto Rico's leading commercial and logistics ecosystem. From market strategy to final 24-hour delivery.
footer.copyright: © 2025 ADVANCE GROUP. BUILT IN PUERTO RICO.

s1: Dedicated fleet covering all 78 municipalities, including Vieques and Culebra.
Real-time tracking from dispatch to confirmed delivery.
Customized SLA agreements — we deliver or we credit.
s2: Optimized routes to reduce transit time and cost per delivery.
Direct integration with your order management system for end-to-end visibility.
Digital proof of delivery with signature, photo and timestamp at every stop.
s4: 3 Caguas facilities with refrigerated, hazmat and special cargo capacity.
Real-time inventory with rotating cycle counts and low-stock alerts.
FIFO, batch and expiration-date tracking — full traceability.
s5: Order processing from receiving to packed and ready to ship.
Multi-channel: B2B, e-commerce and retail from a single fulfillment center.
Picking accuracy rate above 99% with quality audits every shift.
s6: Custom boxes, dividers and protective materials designed for your product.
In-warehouse stock for fast replenishment — no high minimum orders.
Eco-friendly and certified options for regulated industries.
s7: Sales force with deep knowledge of retail and B2B channels across PR.
Coverage in supermarkets, pharmacies, hardware stores, clubs and specialty channels.
Sell-in and sell-out reporting to optimize replenishment and shelf space.
s8: Local market research before the first shipment — real data, not assumptions.
Channel go-to-market plan: pricing, placements and activations.
Hands-on support through introduction, penetration and consolidation.
s9: Point-of-sale activations: tastings, demos and POP materials.
Visual materials coordination from design to shelf installation.
Channel impact measurement and real-time tactic adjustments.
s10: Channel team with fixed routes and weekly coverage KPIs.
Shelf audits, proactive restocking and photo capture at point of sale.
Alignment with your corporate team: shared objectives and executive reports.
